case_title: THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BRANT, JUDITH ANN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRANT, JUDITH ANN $341.20 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $431.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRANT, JUDITH ANN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $341.20 FILED BY THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BRANT, JUDITH ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BRANT, JUDITH ANN
